title: Arrays & Linked Lists
description: Explore static vs dynamic memory, pointer arithmetic, singly and doubly linked lists, and when to choose each structure for optimal performance.

title: Trees & Binary Search Trees
slidesTitle: Tree Data Structures – BST, AVL, and Heaps
description: Master binary trees, BST operations, tree traversals (inorder, preorder, postorder), AVL self-balancing, and heap data structures with real applications.

title: Graph Algorithms
slidesTitle: Graph Theory – BFS, DFS, Dijkstra & Bellman-Ford
description: Represent graphs using adjacency lists and matrices. Implement BFS, DFS, Dijkstra's shortest path, and topological sort for real-world problem solving.
